item.title: Questions to Avoid at the Dealership
item.description: Certain questions at a dealership can unintentionally weaken your negotiating position or complicate the buying process. Which ones should buyers avoid asking too early?

media:content.media:title: Questions to Avoid at the Dealership
media:content.media:description: Certain questions at a dealership can unintentionally weaken your negotiating position or complicate the buying process. Which ones should buyers avoid asking too early?

item.title: Top 5 Vehicles to Buy for $10,000 or Less
item.description: A practical look at five vehicles that can be bought for $10,000 or less. Useful for shoppers comparing value, pricing, and everyday ownership costs. Which of these budget-friendly options would you choose?

media:content.media:title: Top 5 Vehicles to Buy for $10,000 or Less
media:content.media:description: A practical look at five vehicles that can be bought for $10,000 or less. Useful for shoppers comparing value, pricing, and everyday ownership costs. Which of these budget-friendly options would you choose?

item.title: If You Know This Button, You Know Older Cars
item.description: A simple car feature can reveal a lot about how vehicles have changed over time. This video looks at a familiar button from older cars and why it stands out to longtime drivers.

media:content.media:title: If You Know This Button, You Know Older Cars
media:content.media:description: A simple car feature can reveal a lot about how vehicles have changed over time. This video looks at a familiar button from older cars and why it stands out to longtime drivers.

item.title: 5 Car Buying Mistakes That Can Cost You Thousands
item.description: Five common car-buying mistakes can add up fast. Learn what to watch for when comparing prices, features, and dealership offers so you can make a smarter purchase. What should buyers check first?

media:content.media:title: 5 Car Buying Mistakes That Can Cost You Thousands
media:content.media:description: Five common car-buying mistakes can add up fast. Learn what to watch for when comparing prices, features, and dealership offers so you can make a smarter purchase. What should buyers check first?

item.title: Why You Shouldn’t Speak to the Manager
item.description: A simple dealership tip: why speaking to the manager is not always the best move when buying a car. What approach can help you get better pricing and a smoother experience?

media:content.media:title: Why You Shouldn’t Speak to the Manager
media:content.media:description: A simple dealership tip: why speaking to the manager is not always the best move when buying a car. What approach can help you get better pricing and a smoother experience?

item.title: Mistaken Identity: A Camaro Mix-Up
item.description: A car owner thinks they found their stolen Camaro, only to realize it was not the right one. What clues help confirm a vehicle’s identity in situations like this?

media:content.media:title: Mistaken Identity: A Camaro Mix-Up
media:content.media:description: A car owner thinks they found their stolen Camaro, only to realize it was not the right one. What clues help confirm a vehicle’s identity in situations like this?

item.title: Treat Car Buying Like Your Health
item.description: A practical look at car buying with a focus on saving money, understanding pricing, and making smarter dealership decisions. What should shoppers watch for before they buy?

media:content.media:title: Treat Car Buying Like Your Health
media:content.media:description: A practical look at car buying with a focus on saving money, understanding pricing, and making smarter dealership decisions. What should shoppers watch for before they buy?

item.title: Should Customers Remove These Car Accessories?
item.description: A quick look at a common dealership question about whether customers should take these off. What do you think drivers should keep in mind before buying or modifying a vehicle?

media:content.media:title: Should Customers Remove These Car Accessories?
media:content.media:description: A quick look at a common dealership question about whether customers should take these off. What do you think drivers should keep in mind before buying or modifying a vehicle?
